entity.summary: Canadian centralized cryptocurrency trading platform providing simple and advanced spot trading, Canadian-dollar funding, staking, portfolio management, and over-the-counter services for individual and institutional clients.
entity.notes: Current first-party pages expose active simple and advanced trading, CAD deposits and withdrawals, staking, portfolio tools, and OTC services. A current independent exchange registry reports non-zero spot trading volume. HEI uses the current Ndax brand and preserves NDAX as an alias; no exact launch date, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: About Ndax and current Canadian crypto platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party page identifies Ndax as a Canadian-owned cryptocurrency platform and describes its continuing operation for individual and institutional users.

evidence.title: Ndax spot exchange market and volume profile
evidence.notes: Current independent exchange profile reports non-zero 24-hour spot trading volume and links the active ndax.io platform, supporting active classification.
